name: Ulawulo Lokulimala Okubandayo
description: Ukulawulwa kwe-frostbite, unyawo lokuntywiliselwa (unyawo lomsele), kunye ne-hypothermia. Ukonzakala okubandayo kuyathintelwa--qaphela iimpawu zakwangoko phambi kokuba umonakalo wezicubu ungalungiseki. Phatha izicubu ezineqabaka ngobunono.
steps: I-HYPOTHERMIA KUQALA: Vavanya iqondo lobushushu elingundoqo ngethemomitha yokufunda ephantsi. Ubulali (32-35C): ukungcangcazela, ukudideka. Ephakathi (28-32C): akukho kungcangcazela, ukudideka okukhulu. Emandundu (<28C): akukho zingqondweni, akukho pulse ibonwa.

I-HYPOTHERMIA -- Iphakathi/Iphakathi: Susa impahla emanzi, igqume umhlaba, indawo efudumeleyo, ulwelo olushushu oluswiti ukuba uyazi, iipakethe zobushushu kwi-axillae/groin (hayi ngqo eluswini). Phatha ngobunono-i-jaring inokubangela iVFib.

I-HYPOTHERMIA -- Ebukhali: Yiphathe ngobunono KAKHULU. Jonga i-pulse 60 imizuzwana epheleleyo phambi kweCPR. Qalisa iCPR ukuba akukho pulse. Ulwelo olufudumeleyo lwe-IV ukuba lukhona. I-MEDEVAC ephambili -- 'ayifanga de ifudumale kwaye ifile'.

I-FROSTBITE: Ephezulu (isikhumba esimhlophe/engwevu, esithambileyo ngaphantsi) vs. Ubunzulu (ubunzima, ukuvakala komthi, ukudumba). SUKUHLANGANISA indawo. UNGAZIfudumezi kwakhona ukuba umngcipheko wokuphinda ube ngumkhenkce--ukukhenkceza kwakhona kubangela umonakalo ombi kunokulibaziseka ukufudumeza kwakhona.
Ukuvuselela i-FROSTBITE: Gxila kwi-38-42C yamanzi (engatshisi) kwi-15-30 min de izicubu zithambile kwaye zibomvu / ezimfusa. Ibuhlungu kakhulu -- nikeza i-analgesia (ketamine okanye imorphine).
Emva kokufudumeza kwakhona: iphedi phakathi kweenzwane/iminwe ene-gauze eyinyumba. SUKUQHUBA amadyungudyungu. Khusela kuxinzelelo.

UNYAWO LWEMIMERSION (Unyawo lomsele): ukuba sesichengeni okumanzi/okubandayo ixesha elide, ulusu lubomvu luze lube luhlaza emva koko lube namadyunguza. Iinyawo ezomileyo, zifudumale ngokukhawuleza, ziphakamise. MUSA ukusebenzisa ubushushu obuthe ngqo.
Uxwebhu lwexesha lokulimala kunye nexesha lokufudumala.
warnings: Sukufudumeza umkhenkce ukuba kukho naliphi na ithuba lokuphinda umkhenkce -- ukufudumeza okungaphelelanga + ukukhenkceza = ukulahleka kwezicubu eziyingozi.
I-hypothermia enzima inokulinganisa ukufa. Jonga ukubetha kwentliziyo imizuzwana engama-60. 'Ayifanga de ifudumale ife.'
Utywala bonyusa ukulahleka kobushushu nangona ubona ubushushu -- musa ukunika utywala.
Umngcipheko we-VFib uphezulu kwi-hypothermia ephakathi-ebukhali--ukunciphisa ukukhohlisa kunye nokubethelwa kwesigulana.

pediatric.note: Abantwana baphole ngokukhawuleza ngenxa yendawo ephezulu yommandla ukuya kumlinganiselo wobunzima. I-Hypothermia thresholds iyafana. Ulwelo olufudumeleyo lwe-IV lubalulekile. Ulwelo olusekelwe kubunzima: 20 mL/kg eshushu LR.

obstetric.note: I-hypothermia kamama ibangela i-fetal bradycardia kunye ne-acidosis. Ukufudumeza komama ondlongondlongo lunyango losana olungekazalwa. Ukujongwa kwe-Fetal ukuba ikhona.

source: JTS CPG: Cold Weather Injuries / PHTLS / Wilderness Medicine
